requirement_topic.en: SASO Quality Mark / G-Mark and product marking prerequisites
requirement_topic.zh: SASO质量标志/G标记与产品标记前置要求
requirement_topic.zht: SASO品質標誌/G標記與產品標記前置要求

summary.en: For regulated PPE imports, Saudi practice may require the SASO Quality Mark or sectoral G-Mark marking depending on category policy and import regime. Marking is expected on product or accompanying documentation to show that the import file is linked to the active SABER conformity decision.
summary.zh: 对于受监管的PPE进口，沙特实践中可能根据类别政策和进口制度要求SASO Quality Mark或部门性G-Mark标记。标记应在产品或随附文件上体现，以表明该产品与已通过SABER审查的文件链条关联。
summary.zht: 對於受監管的PPE進口，沙特實務中可能依類別政策及進口制度要求SASO Quality Mark或部門性G-Mark標記。標記應在產品或隨附文件中體現，以表示該產品與已通過SABER審查的文件鏈條關聯。

standards_or_laws: SASO Quality Mark / G-Mark marking notices for regulated imported goods
SABER-linked conformity linkage for regulated PPE entries

summary.en: China uses its domestic marking system for certified PPE; where certification applies, CN-marked symbols include CCC or GB references and Chinese-language compliance declarations. These are not interpreted as SASO marks in Saudi import channels.
summary.zh: 中国对已认证PPE采用国内标志体系，涉及CCC或GB标识及中文合规声明。此类符号在沙特进口渠道通常不被视为SASO标志。
summary.zht: 中國對已認證PPE採用國內標誌體系，涉及CCC或GB標識及中文合規聲明。此類符號在沙特進口渠道通常不被視為SASO標誌。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 marking requirements where applicable in domestic sale
CCC marking framework for applicable product categories

gap.en: Where Saudi expects SASO mark linkage, using Chinese-only symbols only leaves a compliance mismatch. Exporters must align with the Saudi mark route for the exact import category and avoid mixing domestic and Saudi mark families on the same shipment dossier.
gap.zh: 若沙特目标是SASO标志联动，仅使用中文符号会导致合规错位。出口商须按沙特对应进口类别选择正确标志路径，避免在同一批次中混用国内与沙特标识体系。
gap.zht: 若沙特目標是SASO標誌聯動，仅使用中文符號會導致合規錯位。出口商須按沙特對應進口類別選擇正確標誌路徑，避免在同一批次中混用國內與沙特標誌體系。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the Saudi entry category requires SASO / G-marking visibility for regulated PPE
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for categories requiring domestic certification symbols

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume domestic China mark packages are acceptable as Saudi mark indicators. For regulated categories, the Saudi file should explicitly use the SASO/G-Mark route required by the active import category and keep symbol consistency across PCoC and SCoC-linked documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要假定中国国内标志包可替代沙特标识。对于受监管类别，沙特文件应按生效进口类别明确使用SASO/G-Mark路径，并在PCoC与SCoC关联文件中保持标志一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要假定中國國內標誌包可代替沙特標識。對於受監管類別，沙特文件應按生效進口類別明確使用SASO/G-Mark路徑，並在PCoC與SCoC關聯文件中保持標誌一致。
